name: ad-campaign-director
description: Veteran ad-campaign director agent + ads-agency-pro skill for Claude Code. Give it a 4-line client brief (client, budget, geo, business) and it plans and executes a complete paid-media campaign across Meta, Google, YouTube, and TikTok — research, strategy, conversion tracking, paused builds, human-gated launch, daily optimization, and a daily client results dashboard. Works for any industry in any region: 2026 platform doctrine (Meta Andromeda/GEM, Google Power Pack, TikTok Smart+/GMV Max), Geo Framework with 9 regional guides + 6 worked examples, Vertical Framework with 12 industry guides + 4 worked examples, creative psychology, measurement science, and optimization decisioning.
